PISTOL.name: Pistol
PISTOL.description: Increases your chance of escaping a shootout without losing inventory.

CAR.name: Fast Car
CAR.description: Reduces police threat by 25% when travelling between cities.

STASH.name: Stash House
STASH.description: Adds 50 units to your carry capacity.

ARMOR.name: Body Armor
ARMOR.description: Reduces the cash fine when arrested by 40%.

INFORM.name: Informant
INFORM.description: Tips you off about the best deal at your next destination (one use).

MEDKIT.name: Med Kit
MEDKIT.description: Prevents inventory loss during a shootout (one use).

LAWYER.name: Lawyer on Retainer
LAWYER.description: Reduces any arrest fine by 60% — permanently.

BOAT.name: Speedboat
BOAT.description: Once per game, skip a police encounter completely.
